title: [Feature] Real-time Portal UI Localization (i18n)
body:
**Epic Description:**
Currently, the portal UI pages are hardcoded in English and lack full localization. We need to implement a comprehensive i18n system that allows the portal to support multiple languages and switch between them in real-time without page reloads.

**Implementation Plan:**
1. Introduce an i18n utility on the frontend to manage translation dictionaries.
2. Extract all hardcoded English strings from the portal UI into a base English dictionary.
3. **Use AI to translate** the base English dictionary into the target supported languages.
4. Add a language selector dropdown or toggle in the UI to allow real-time language switching.

issues.title: Extract portal UI strings and setup i18n engine
issues.body: Implement the frontend i18n logic and extract all hardcoded UI strings into a base `en` JSON dictionary.

issues.title: AI Translation of UI dictionaries
issues.body: Use AI to translate the base English UI dictionary into the target supported languages.

issues.title: Real-time language switcher UI
issues.body: Implement a language selector in the portal dashboard to allow real-time switching without full page reloads.
